channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: U.S. and Iran work toward deal to extend ceasefire and reopen Strait of Hormuz - The Washington Post
item.description:
1. U.S. and Iran work toward deal to extend ceasefire and reopen Strait of Hormuz  The Washington Post
  2. What’s in the proposed deal that could end the US-Iran conflict?  CNN
  3. Live Updates: Iran and U.S. agree deal to end war taking shape, but Iran says obstacles remain  CBS News
  4. Iran says no deal ‘imminent’ despite progress in talks with U.S.  NBC News
  5. Iran denies deal with US is imminent despite some progress  The Guardian

item.title: Trump tells US negotiators 'not to rush' into deal with Iran - BBC
item.description:

item.title: Trump asked Muslim leaders to sign peace deal with Israel after Iran war ends - Axios
item.description:

item.title: To Get the Strait Open, Trump Had to Leave the Hardest Issues for Later - The New York Times
item.description:
1. To Get the Strait Open, Trump Had to Leave the Hardest Issues for Later  The New York Times
  2. Why Trump’s possible Iran deal may be almost as divisive as his decision to wage war  CNN
  3. Opinion | Trump’s Iran exit ramp is a long shot. He doesn’t have a better option.  The Washington Post
  4. The more generous U.S. ceasefire terms are, the more suspicious Iran becomes about another attack  Fortune
  5. Why Trump Lost to Iran  The Atlantic

item.title: US and Iran inch closer to peace deal as Trump faces criticism from GOP hawks - The Guardian
item.description:
1. US and Iran inch closer to peace deal as Trump faces criticism from GOP hawks  The Guardian
  2. Trump’s emerging plan to end Iran war draws criticism from hard-line Republicans  PBS
  3. Trump says he does not make bad deals, but even Republican hawks doubt that now  The Guardian
  4. Senate Republicans Cast Doubt on a Potential Peace Deal With Iran  The New York Times
  5. Trump’s Iran deal up in the air amid GOP blowback  MS NOW
